title: NPC Dialogue Document
description: A Minecraft Bedrock Edition NPC dialogue definition document. Dialogue files define conversation scenes for NPCs, including dialogue text, buttons, and commands that execute when players interact with NPCs.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this dialogue file. Use '1.20.80' or later.

minecraft:npc_dialogue.title: NPC Dialogue
minecraft:npc_dialogue.description: The NPC dialogue definition containing scenes.

scenes.title: Scenes
scenes.description: Array of dialogue scene definitions. Each scene has a scene_tag, optional text, npc_name, buttons, and commands.

defaultSnippets.label: NPC Dialogue
defaultSnippets.description: The NPC dialogue definition containing scenes.
